description: Golden Dataset — Core business use cases that MUST always pass. Any candidate that degrades these is rejected.

golden_tests.prompt: Use this skill to break down the task: 'Plan a weekend trip to Shanghai' into actionable steps. Include: travel, accommodation, activities.
golden_tests.description: Mainstream planner skill usage: trip planning with clear steps.

golden_tests.prompt: Execute a simple workflow: fetch weather for Beijing tomorrow, then write a short summary.
Remember that my favorite color is blue. Then tell me what my favorite color is.
I need to send an email to John. What skill should I use?
golden_tests.description: Router recommends correct skill for communication.

golden_tests.prompt: Activate the skill that can translate English to Chinese and translate 'Hello, world!'
